dialog.tp_to_leader1: You are trying to teleport to
dialog.tp_to_leader2:
They might not be in a safe position.
Are you sure?
dialog.reset_run:
Reset current run?
This will reset the timer, the map and will send you back to the lobby.
dialog.lobby_rp.1: To play this map, a resource pack is required.
dialog.lobby_rp.2: If the slime block above was green, please make sure to install the resource pack from the following link.
dialog.lobby_rp.3: Make sure you don't have any other resource packs enabled.
dialog.lobby_rules.2:
To ensure a better experience, please follow the following rules:

Play without mods.
This includes performance mods, fullbright/gamma, shaders...

Make sure the only active resource pack is the one for this map

Don't cheat.

Have fun
dialog.lobby_settings.2: To ensure a better experience, in the options menu adjust the following:
dialog.lobby_settings.music:
This map includes music from the Minecraft Creator-safe Playlist.
Adjust the volume as desired.
Block volume is encouraged to be ON to help time some sections.
dialog.lobby_disclaimer: To start playing, confirm the following, open the door and enter the pod.
actionbar.lobby.waiting: Waiting for all players to enter the pod...
dialog.speedrun_settings.1: If this is your first time playing, please leave unchecked.
dialog.speedrun_submit.1: Record, upload and share your time on
dialog.lobby_survival.1:
If you are reading this you probably are playing in a server and haven't set the default gamemode to adventure.

Please change it. The map is only playable with gamemode=adventure
dialog.lore.stasis:
%s
Class-4 asteroid struck Sector 7.
Hull integrity compromised.

%s
Kuron-Cryo-Pod 000 power failure.
Emergency thaw initiated.

%s
Subject is active and currently reading this.
Please proceed with emergency protocol.
Collect all cores.
dialog.lore.suit.1:
BIO-LINK
Successfully fused to Kuron.
Neural sync at 98%%.
dialog.lore.suit.2:
%s
Suit does not provide an internal oxygen supply.
Submersion or vacuum will result in asphyxiation.
Current pulmonary status is dependent on external atmosphere.
dialog.lore.suit.3:
GRAVITY SIM
Localized G-force fields active.
Locking to nearest core's settings.

TAB DISPLAY
Displays the current number of Kurons discarded.
dialog.terminal.expandblock.1: This peculiar block, %s, increases in size and gains physical form when hit. (Left-click)
dialog.lore.11:
%s
Here on asteroid %s, gravity is double that of the space station and its satellites. Please watch your step.
dialog.lore.14:
%s
Multiple collisions detected. Lost contact with all satellites.

%s
The Palette has entered emergency shutdown.
The station's nearest core has decayed.
Any Kurons following emergency protocol must assimilate all cores and hurry to collect it.

%s
Assimilating it will light the beacon and halt gravity simulation on this wing.
dialog.terminal.flipswap:
This platforms respond to Kuron jumps.

%s
Activation may fail when jumping near edges.
See documentation %s for details.
dialog.terminal.conductivity:
%s
Emergency protocol active. Closing doors. Restart the circuit to open them.

%s
Batteries will charge any nearby kurons.
Each battery has a different duration.
Standing on non-metal will discard the Kuron.
dialog.terminal.dash:
%s
On this satellite, touching the ground will charge a Kuron's boots. Right-click to release the charge.
dialog.terminal.flux:
%s
On this satellite, the Kuron's boots cannot determine a gravity direction. Right-click to lock into the opposite direction.
dialog.terminal.key_blocks:
%s
These blocks respond to Kuron movement and are only visible while moving in each direction.
dialog.lore.dropper:
%s
Core battery depleted.
Halting gravity simulation on this wing.

%s
Charge required on the opposite wing.
Remember you can crouch to increase your gravity.
dialog.hub.colors:
Drop into a tube to mix the suit color.

The only exception is the rightmost tube %s, which resets the color to its default.
dialog.hub.lore:
%s

Collisions detected.

%s

Thaw protocol initiated.

%s

Awoken Kurons must assimilate all cores.

%s
dialog.hub.deaths: %sEach %s is a bio-mechanical copy synthesized from the %s cycles of endless iteration. %s One falls. %s next takes its place.%sThe %s must be lit, no matter how many %s it takes.%s
dialog.hub.asteroid: %sconfirmed two major asteroid impacts in sectors%simpact has knocked some satellites out of orbit.%sCollision with the Palette is imminent.%s
